title: crepidium sublobatum
intro: Crepidium sublobatum, also known as the lesser crepidium, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidium sublobatum include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
